title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIOS OF BONGLEW, CABAGOAN, TAROSAN, INAMLAN, BOBOLUSAN, CANCAHEPUS, ROMBANG, VIGO, YAPAS, SAN ANTONIO, GREGORIO B. TAN, AROGANGA, CA-BAGÃGAN, BURABOD, AGRUPACION, ANTIPOLO, LAWA-AN, CANYOMANAO, LANOBE, TENOBLAN AND SUBA IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LAOANG, PROVINCE OF SAMAR.

chunks.text:
H. No. 595 / 55 OG No. 36, 7627 (September 7, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2471, June 21, 1959 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIOS OF BONGLEW, CABAGOAN, TAROSAN, INAMLAN, BOBOLUSAN, CANCAHEPUS, ROMBANG, VIGO, YAPAS, SAN ANTONIO, GREGORIO B. TAN, AROGANGA, CA-BAGÃGAN, BURABOD, AGRUPACION, ANTIPOLO, LAWA-AN, CANYOMANAO, LANOBE, TENOBLAN AND SUBA IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LAOANG, PROVINCE OF SAMAR.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, June 21, 1959.
